channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Grew Sales in Europe for the First Time in a Year. Is the Automaker's Stock Set to Soar in 2026?
item.description: It's an encouraging headline to be sure. Now consider the rest of the story, while also looking at what's happening outside of Europe.

item.title: Elon Musk has generous TSA offer denied by the White House: here’s why
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk made a generous offer to pay the salaries of Transportation Security Administration (TSA) employees last week, but the offer was denied by the White House. In a striking display of private-sector initiative clashing with federal bureaucracy, the White House has turn...

item.title: Nio Rises 5% While Tesla Stalls: The EV Rivalry Just Got a Lot More Interesting
item.description: Nio (NYSE:NIO) is having a Monday to remember. NIO shares are up 5% in midday trading, climbing from an opening price of $5.31 to more than $5.50. Meanwhile, Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is essentially sitting still, trading near $362.

item.title: Tesla: The Market Will Eventually Ignore The Carefully Crafted Disruption Narrative
Elon Musk's xAI Loses Last Original Co-Founder Ahead Of SpaceX IPO: Report
item.description: Elon Musk‘s last original co-founder at xAI, Ross Nordeen, has reportedly resigned. This marks the end of an era for the company, which is now undergoing a major reorganization as it prepares for a high-profile IPO. Last Original Co-Founder Departs xAI Nordeen, one of the 11 co-founders who helpe...

item.title: Assessing Tesla (TSLA) Valuation As Shares Weaken And AI Narratives Diverge
item.description: Tesla’s recent performance in context Tesla (TSLA) has been under pressure recently, with the share price showing a 2.8% decline over the past day and weaker returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months. For investors tracking the stock, the current share price of US$361.83 sits against a...

item.title: CYBERCABs in OKC
item.description: submitted by /u/ZackKreggs [link] [comments]

item.title: Another Tesla Cybercab production leader leaves as exodus continues
item.description: Mark Lupkey, the manufacturing operations leader who oversaw Cybercab assembly and end-of-line ramp at Giga Texas, has announced his departure from Tesla. He is the third senior leader directly involved in bringing the Cybercab to production to leave the company in just over a month. Lupkey spent...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises. It’s Trying to End a 6-Week Losing Streak.
item.description: Tesla stock rose early Monday after failing to end its weekly losing streak on Friday. Tesla stock dropped 2.8% on Friday, falling with most stocks, which left it down 1.7% for the week, the sixth consecutive weekly drop. The week of Tesla’s better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings report wa...

item.title: Tesla: The Implosion Isn't Done Yet
Should Tesla be Worried About BYD?
item.description: Tesla stock is rising despite challenges within its core market.

item.title: Tesla: Promises Of Robots And Space Data Centers Do Not Justify This Valuation
Why April Could Be a Turning Point for Tesla Stock
item.description: Investors are hoping for some positive news on the company's robotaxi rollout in April.

item.title: Will Musk’s $1.6 Trillion Disruption Be His Biggest Yet?
item.description: Elon Musk has a track record of dismantling long-held industry assumptions to save money.

item.title: Statistically, These 2 "Magnificent Seven" Stocks Are Genius Buys, Based on a Time-Tested Valuation Metric
item.description: Among Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla, there are two deeply discounted bargains.

item.title: Tesla FSD mocks BMW human driver: Saves pedestrian from near miss
item.description: A video posted to r/TeslaFSD this week put a sharp spotlight on Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (FSD) software being able to react to pedestrian intent than an actual human driver behind the wheel. In the Reddit clip, a BMW driver can be seen rolling through a neighborhood street completely unaware of ...

item.title: Tesla Semi Million Mile Battery Puts Freight Economics In Focus
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) reports that the battery for its Semi truck is engineered to last 1 million miles. The company positions this battery as a way to support long term, economic freight operations for commercial fleets. The disclosure focuses on heavy duty trucking technology, separate from rec...

item.title: Model X - Home of 3 Years, 2 Continents, 14 countries and counting
item.description: Hi hi! I am Sandro and I have been living on the open road for 3 years now, covering 2 continents, 14 countries, and the odemeter just surpassed 153,000km (94,000 miles). Currently driving the full length of the Americas!

item.title: Tesla carelessly promotes ‘Full Self-Driving’ for driver losing his eyesight
item.description: Tesla North America’s official account on X promoted a video interview of a new Cybertruck owner who says his ophthalmologist recommended he buy a Tesla with “Full Self-Driving” because he is losing his eyesight. The problem is that Tesla itself classifies FSD as a Level 2 driver-assist system th...

item.title: Iran, Oil Prices and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
item.description: Markets enter a huge week as the final days of March bring an explosive convergence of catalysts including Friday's jobs report, Q1 vehicle production and delivery numbers from Tesla (TSLA), Rivian (RIVN), and major Chinese EV makers, and escalating Iran war concerns as President Trump's 10-day w...

item.title: Tesla Launches New V4 Supercharger Stations That Fold
item.description: After more than 7 years and 15,000 units deployed, Tesla is transitioning from V3 Superchargers to V4 Superchargers. There are a few notable improvements to these Superchargers. First of all, these Supercharger stalls can provide up to 500 kW of power to individual cars.

item.title: Don’t question when your tesla pulls a quirky move
item.description: submitted by /u/ifuckedyourmom-247 [link] [comments]

item.title: Amazon Acquires Fauna Robotics. Is This a Viable Threat to Tesla's Optimus Project?
item.description: Amazon's humanoid bet isn't about competing with Tesla's factory robots. Its about quietly building the operating system for the home.

item.title: Tesla Beware: BYD Just Played The James Bond Card In Europe
item.description: BYD recently reported a 185% year-over-year sales increase for the European market for the month of February. The company isn't ready to slow down with its push in Europe and its bringing along a well-known actor to help boost its effort. BYD Turns to James Bond For New Vehicle Launch With a goal...

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Sees Q1 Slowdown—365K Deliveries Expected
item.description: Tesla Inc. has shared company-complied delivery estimates for the first quarter of 2026, citing data from various industry analysts and research firms. Tesla Touts 365K Deliveries In a press release published on Thursday, the automaker shared that analysts expect 365,645 deliveries this quarter, ...

item.title: Just passed by a prototype cyber SUV in Austin I think
item.description: Saw a funky lookin ev in downtown Austin, thought it looked like a weird gold metallic model y, passed by and it had the cyber truck font text on the side, but no visible Tesla logo submitted by /u/Biggie-Shmaltz [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Says Semi Battery Is 'Designed To Last A Million Miles'
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) said it has developed a long-lasting battery for its Semi truck, targeting one of the biggest barriers to electric trucking: vehicle lifespan. The battery is "designed to last a million miles," Tesla Semi program lead Dan Priestley said Monday on the "Jay Leno's Garage" p...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi gets a small but significant change
item.description: In the world of Tesla, where billion-dollar battery breakthroughs and autonomy milestones dominate headlines, a quiet design update can still pack a punch. Last week in downtown Austin, sharp-eyed observers spotted a subtle but telling evolution on the Cybercab: a new “ROBOTAXI” logo graphic now ...

item.title: Elon Musk’s last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
item.description: All but two of Musk's 11 xAI co-founders departed before this week.

item.title: Elon Musk 'Starved The Balance Sheet' At Tesla Post-IPO To Keep Employees Sharp, Says Former TSLA President McNeill
item.description: Former Tesla Inc. president Jon McNeill revealed that after its 2010 IPO, Elon Musk intentionally “starved the balance sheet,” often keeping only enough cash on hand to last a single quarter to avoid complacency. Tesla Operated on Minimal Cash Speaking on TBPN with John Coogan and Jordi Hays, McN...

item.title: Braclays Points Out CapEx Concerns for Tesla (TSLA) Stock
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 High Growth Mega Cap Stocks to Buy and Hold for Next 10 Years. On March 23, Barclays analyst Dan Levy reiterated a Hold rating on Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Musk’s Terafab plans seen having limited impact on TSMC
item.description: Investing.com – Elon Musk’s proposed “Terafab” semiconductor project is unlikely to significantly disrupt Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC), with execution risks, high costs and long timelines limiting its competitive impact, according to BofA Securities.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Shares Up After Jim Cramer Said It Had Options
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the Jim Cramer’s Hottest Robotics and Physical AI Stock Picks. Jim Cramer, like Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Vanguard’s VCR ETF Carries 40% Amazon and Tesla Exposure Dressed as Consumer Discretionary
item.description: Vanguard Consumer Discretionary ETF (NYSEARCA:VCR) is down nearly 9% year-to-date, but the story behind that number matters more than the number itself. This fund carries the “consumer discretionary” label, yet nearly 40% of its portfolio sits in just two stocks that behave more like technology b...

item.title: Tesla makes latest announcement on Model S and Model X
item.description: Tesla has officially begun winding down production of its flagship Model S and Model X in the United States, notifying owners via email that the long-running models will soon reach the end of the line. The email, sent to U.S. customers on March 27, opens with gratitude.

item.title: Dave Ramsey Tells 20-Year-Old to Cancel His $30K Truck Deal: ‘You Can Have a Good Life’
item.description: A 20-year-old with $50,000 in debt on a $50,000 annual income called The Ramsey Show to ask for help getting out of the hole. The problem: he had made it significantly deeper roughly 12 hours earlier. “I just traded in a 2023 Tesla Model 3 just last night for a truck because the Wisconsin winters...

item.title: Tesla drives drunk owner while he naps, Police still arrest him on DUI
item.description: A Northern California man found a creative solution to drunk driving this week by letting his Tesla drive him around while he took a booze snooze. Police in Vacaville arrested a man on a DUI charge after he was found, what appears to be, completely passed out behind the wheel of a Tesla Model Y, ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Down Nearly 20% in 6 Months — Are People Giving Up On Tesla Robotaxis?
item.description: Admittedly, I don’t really pay much attention to Tesla’s stock price, or any company stock prices. However, because of the work I do, I see headlines about stock price trends here and there. I didn’t realize until today that Tesla’s stock price has been trending downward for a while, but ...

item.title: Tesla Analyst Thinks Tesla Could Merge With SpaceX In 2027
item.description: SpaceX is on the verge of a giant IPO (initial public offering). Once upon a time, Elon Musk said that he never wanted to take a company public again, because he didn’t like the public oversight and annoying questions from analysts every quarter. But I guess Musk doesn’t really run ...

item.title: The Playbook That Elon Musk Relies On to Make His Wild Ideas Work
item.description: Musk’s five-step algorithm gets Tesla and SpaceX employees to achieve stretch goals and innovate, and it’s sure to come in handy in his push to build the world’s largest AI chip factory.

item.title: HSBC Thinks Tesla Stock Could Fall 65%. Here's Why.
item.description: HSBC's lead analyst on Tesla thinks the stock could fall to $131 per share.

item.title: Tesla Terafab Deal Fuels SpaceX Merger Talk And AI Chip Ambitions
item.description: Speculation around a potential Tesla and SpaceX merger has intensified after the companies announced a joint Terafab semiconductor factory in Austin, Texas. New information on how AI, robotics and space operations could be integrated across both companies is drawing fresh attention from analysts ...

item.title: SpaceX IPO could lean heavily on retail investors
item.description: Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley joins anchor Josh Lipton to discuss a report that SpaceX’s (SPAX.PVT) IPO could take an unconventional approach, with a large share allocation to retail investors.

item.title: Podcast: Tesla minivan but cooler?, used EV sales rise, sodium batteries are coming
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla coming with minivan but cooler?, used EV sales rising, sodium batteries are coming, and more. more…

item.title: Tesla Semi wins over truck drivers with real-world praise amid latest upgrades
item.description: Tesla’s all-electric Semi is proving more than just a flashy concept as it is winning converts among the professionals who know trucks best. As fleets roll out Pilot Programs for Tesla across North America , drivers are raving about the Class 8 electric truck’s unique features, including a center...

item.title: Tesla and SpaceX to merge in 2027, Wall Street analyst predicts
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX are two of Elon Musk’s most popular and notable companies, but a new note from one Wall Street analyst claims the two companies will become one sometime next year, as 2027 could see the dawn of a new horizon. In a bold new research note, Wedbush analyst Dan Ives has reaffirmed hi...

item.title: The Tesla Robotaxi Story Is A Myth: Why I'm Maintaining My Strong Sell Into Q1 Earnings
Is merging with SpaceX the new 'master plan' at Tesla?
Tesla lands on Fortune’s 2026 Most Innovative Companies and the Cybercab is why
item.description: Fortune has named Tesla to its America’s Most Innovative Companies 2026 list , and the timing could not carry more weight. With Cybercab production ramping at Gigafactory Texas and a driverless Robotaxi service expanding to key cities in the US, Tesla’s inclusion is a direct reflection of the fut...

item.title: Tesla ‘Killer’ heads to the graveyard as AFEELA taps out
item.description: There have been many Tesla “Killers” over the years, all of which have either failed to dethrone the automaker from its dominance in the United States, or even make it to the market altogether . The Sony Honda Mobility (SHM) project, known as AFEELA, is the latest to make it to the grave, as the ...
